news.title:
EPL Ltd announced a merger with Indovida India Pvt Ltd, creating a $1B revenue packaging leader focused on emerging markets.
Post-merger, EPL's EBITDA will rise to INR1,750 crore. Indorama will hold a 51.8% stake, and Blackstone will retain 16.6%.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd announced a merger with Indovida India Pvt Ltd, creating a $1B revenue packaging leader focused on emerging markets.
Post-merger, EPL's EBITDA will rise to INR1,750 crore. Indorama will hold a 51.8% stake, and Blackstone will retain 16.6%.

news.title:
ICICI Securities maintains Buy on EPL post-Indovida merger, setting a Rs 315 target price.
Merger offers 54% upside, robust growth potential, but faces near-term risks like rising polymer costs.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities maintains Buy on EPL post-Indovida merger, setting a Rs 315 target price.
Merger offers 54% upside, robust growth potential, but faces near-term risks like rising polymer costs.

news.title:
EPL Ltd and Indovida to merge, forming a $1B revenue entity valued at $2B.
EPL valued 70% above recent close; Indorama Ventures to hold 51.8%, Blackstone 16.6%.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd and Indovida to merge, forming a $1B revenue entity valued at $2B.
EPL valued 70% above recent close; Indorama Ventures to hold 51.8%, Blackstone 16.6%.

news.title:
EPL Ltd's board approved the merger of Indovida India Pvt Ltd with EPL, subject to regulatory approvals.
The merger aims to enhance product range, operational efficiency, and stakeholder value through resource pooling.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd's board approved the merger of Indovida India Pvt Ltd with EPL, subject to regulatory approvals.
The merger aims to enhance product range, operational efficiency, and stakeholder value through resource pooling.

news.title:
EPL Ltd fully paid Rs. 30 Cr CPs due on Mar 23, 2026.
CPs were issued on Dec 23, 2025; payment aligned with Mar 20, 2026 record date.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd fully paid Rs. 30 Cr CPs due on Mar 23, 2026.
CPs were issued on Dec 23, 2025; payment aligned with Mar 20, 2026 record date.

news.title:
EPL Ltd announced Rs. 30 crore Commercial Papers maturity on March 23, 2026.
Issue date was Dec 23, 2025; record date for maturity is March 20, 2026.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd announced Rs. 30 crore Commercial Papers maturity on March 23, 2026.
Issue date was Dec 23, 2025; record date for maturity is March 20, 2026.

news.title:
EPL Ltd issues and allots Rs. 50 crore commercial papers at a 7.4% yield, maturing June 1, 2026.
1000 units listed on NSE; not material for EPL Ltd per SEBI LODR regulations.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd issues and allots Rs. 50 crore commercial papers at a 7.4% yield, maturing June 1, 2026.
1000 units listed on NSE; not material for EPL Ltd per SEBI LODR regulations.

news.title:
EPL Ltd announces Rs. 45 cr CPs maturing on Mar 2, 2026.
Record date set as Feb 27, 2026; CPs issued Dec 3, 2025.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd announces Rs. 45 cr CPs maturing on Mar 2, 2026.
Record date set as Feb 27, 2026; CPs issued Dec 3, 2025.

news.title:
EPL reports Q3 EBITDA of 231M INR, up from 202M YoY.
EBITDA margin improves to 20.1% from 19.9% YoY, indicating growth.
news.summary:
EPL reports Q3 EBITDA of 231M INR, up from 202M YoY.
EBITDA margin improves to 20.1% from 19.9% YoY, indicating growth.

news.title:
EPL Ltd achieved 13.3% revenue growth in Q3FY26, with EBITDA margin at 20.1%, driven by robust regional performances.
PAT excluding exceptional items grew 11%. ROCE improved to 18.7%, while sustainable tubes now comprise over 33% of the portfolio.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd achieved 13.3% revenue growth in Q3FY26, with EBITDA margin at 20.1%, driven by robust regional performances.
PAT excluding exceptional items grew 11%. ROCE improved to 18.7%, while sustainable tubes now comprise over 33% of the portfolio.

news.title:
EPL Ltd confirmed full redemption of Rs. 50 Cr Commercial Papers on Jan 23, 2026.
The CPs, issued on Oct 27, 2025, were redeemed as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd confirmed full redemption of Rs. 50 Cr Commercial Papers on Jan 23, 2026.
The CPs, issued on Oct 27, 2025, were redeemed as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
EPL Ltd announces record date as January 22, 2026, for Rs. 50 Cr CP maturity.
The maturity date for the commercial papers is set for January 23, 2026.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd announces record date as January 22, 2026, for Rs. 50 Cr CP maturity.
The maturity date for the commercial papers is set for January 23, 2026.

news.title:
EPL Ltd appoints Hemant Bakshi as MD & Global CEO for a 5-year term.
Anand Kripalu transitions to Executive Director role until March 31, 2026.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd appoints Hemant Bakshi as MD & Global CEO for a 5-year term.
Anand Kripalu transitions to Executive Director role until March 31, 2026.

news.title:
EPL Ltd increased investment in its subsidiary EPL Packaging Thailand to expand laminated tubes manufacturing.
This move aims to strengthen EPL's presence and drive growth in the Thai market.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd increased investment in its subsidiary EPL Packaging Thailand to expand laminated tubes manufacturing.
This move aims to strengthen EPL's presence and drive growth in the Thai market.

news.title:
EPL Ltd fully repaid Rs. 55 Cr commercial papers on Dec 3, 2025.
CPs were issued on Sept 4, 2025, confirming timely debt repayment on maturity.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd fully repaid Rs. 55 Cr commercial papers on Dec 3, 2025.
CPs were issued on Sept 4, 2025, confirming timely debt repayment on maturity.

news.title:
India Ratings affirmed EPL Ltd's issuer rating at IND AA (Stable) as of Nov 27, 2025.
EPL's commercial paper rating remains IND A1; compliance under SEBI LODR regulations.
news.summary:
India Ratings affirmed EPL Ltd's issuer rating at IND AA (Stable) as of Nov 27, 2025.
EPL's commercial paper rating remains IND A1; compliance under SEBI LODR regulations.

news.title:
EPL Ltd's Rs. 55 crore commercial papers mature on Dec 3, 2025.
Issue date was Sept 4, 2025; record date is Dec 2, 2025.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd's Rs. 55 crore commercial papers mature on Dec 3, 2025.
Issue date was Sept 4, 2025; record date is Dec 2, 2025.

news.title:
EPL Ltd reported 11% revenue, 16.1% EBITDA, and 19.9% PAT growth in Q2 H1 FY26.
EBITDA margin improved to 20.9%, ROCE at 18.7%. New Thailand plant operational; EcoVadis Platinum awarded.
news.summary:
EPL Ltd reported 11% revenue, 16.1% EBITDA, and 19.9% PAT growth in Q2 H1 FY26.
EBITDA margin improved to 20.9%, ROCE at 18.7%. New Thailand plant operational; EcoVadis Platinum awarded.

news.title: EPL management forecasts growth rebound in upcoming quarters per latest concall.
news.summary: EPL management forecasts growth rebound in upcoming quarters per latest concall.

news.title: EPL Limited approves dividend payout of Rs 2.5 per share.
news.summary: EPL Limited approves dividend payout of Rs 2.5 per share.
